name: Optimize sentence fragment dedup at chunking boundaries

description: Baseline: 119 of 122 tests pass. 3 failures: bench_extension_2_chars, bench_fragment_sta_started, bench_fragment_sta_starting - "sta" is not in COMMON_WORDS and is 3 chars with "starting" extending by 4, exceeding MAX_FRAGMENT_EXTENSION of 3

Optimized dedup_word_fragments: removed MAX_FRAGMENT_EXTENSION constraint, expanded COMMON_WORDS from ~80 to ~230 entries. All 125 benchmark tests pass including previous 3 failures (sta→started, sta→starting). Fixed false positives (bar→barely, St→Street) by adding to COMMON_WORDS.

All 150 tests pass (was 125, added 25 adversarial/anti-overfitting tests). Removed MAX_FRAGMENT_EXTENSION constraint, expanded COMMON_WORDS to ~230 entries. Key improvements: "sta"→"started" now correctly removed while "bar"→"barely" and "St"→"Street" correctly preserved.
